## Go Tools
- **go** — Go programming language toolchain — compiler, formatter, and standard tooling
- **golangci-lint** — Fast Go linter runner — aggregates and runs many linters in one pass
- **goreleaser** — Go release automation — builds cross-platform binaries and publishes GitHub releases
